sentences.arabic: التَّوَكُّلُ عَلَى اللهِ هُوَ اعْتِمَادُ الْقَلْبِ عَلَى الْخَالِقِ وَحْدَهُ مَعَ الْأَخْذِ بِالْأَسْبَابِ.
sentences.translation: Oslonac na Allaha (tevekkul) je oslanjanje srca isključivo na Stvoritelja uz poduzimanje potrebnih uzroka.
sentences.translationEn: Trust in Allah (Tawakkul) is the heart's reliance on the Creator alone while taking the necessary means.

sentences.arabic: ذَكَرَ الْإِمَامُ ابْنُ الْقَيِّمِ أَنَّ التَّوَكُّلَ نِصْفُ الدِّينِ، وَالنِّصْفُ الثَّانِي هُوَ الْإِنَابَةُ.
sentences.translation: Imam Ibn el-Kajjim je spomenuo da je tevekkul polovina vjere, a druga polovina je povratak Allahu.
sentences.translationEn: Imam Ibn al-Qayyim mentioned that Tawakkul is half of the religion, and the other half is turning to Allah in repentance.

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي ذَلِكَ أَنَّ الْمُسْلِمَ يَعْمَلُ بِجِدٍّ، لَكِنَّهُ يَعْلَمُ أَنَّ التَّوْفِيقَ بِيَدِ اللهِ فَقَطْ.
sentences.translation: To znači da musliman naporno radi, ali zna da je uspjeh samo u Allahovim rukama.
sentences.translationEn: This means that a Muslim works hard, but knows that success is in the hands of Allah only.

sentences.arabic: مَنْ تَوَكَّلَ عَلَى اللهِ كَفَاهُ هَمَّهُ وَيَسَّرَ لَهُ أَمْرَهُ.
sentences.translation: Ko se osloni na Allaha, On mu je dovoljan u njegovim brigama i olakša mu njegove poslove.
sentences.translationEn: Whoever relies on Allah, He will suffice him in his concerns and ease his affairs.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الْخُلُقُ يَمْلأُ الْقَلْبَ بِالطُّمَأْنِينَةِ وَالرِّضَا بِالْقَدَرِ.
sentences.translation: Ova osobina ispunjava srce smirenošću i zadovoljstvom sudbinom.
sentences.translationEn: This character trait fills the heart with tranquility and satisfaction with destiny.
